summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LOGITAG Premium SaaS - Map page (fullscreen Leaflet), Dashboard, Assets, and navigation between all 3 pages. All requested features are working correctly.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

issues: Stats text shows '0 localisés200 sans GPS' - missing space between numbers. Should be '0 localisés | 200 sans GPS' or similar separator

passed_tests: Login flow with admin/user@1234 credentials - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
Dashboard: 4 KPI cards with real data (28/5937 Engins non tagués, 29/53 Tague libre, 1/5937 Liste engin au depôt, 1/53 Tague à maintenir)
Dashboard: KPI click opens detail section below KPIs
Dashboard widgets: mini-map-widget, alerts-feed-widget, activity-timeline-widget all present
Navigate to Assets via sidebar (sidebar-nav-assets) - URL: /view/engin/index
Assets page: Card grid with 20 asset cards showing real data
Assets page: List view toggle works correctly
Assets page: Search input visible and functional
Assets page: Filter chips (Tous, Entrée, Sortie) visible and clickable
Navigate to Map via sidebar (sidebar-nav-map) - URL: /tour/index
Map page: Fullscreen mode - main sidebar hidden (PremiumLayout hides sidebar for /tour/index)
Map page: Map sidebar visible with 200 assets
Map page: Search input works (filtered to 1 item for 'Golf')
Map page: Filters work (Tous: 200, Entrée: 4, Sortie: 29)
Map page: Sidebar toggle works (< to close, > to open)
Map page: Stats overlay shows 'X localisés' and 'Y sans GPS'
Map page: FAB group visible with Recentrer and Calques buttons
Map page: Leaflet map with CARTO tiles loads correctly
Navigation: Dashboard -> Assets -> Map -> Dashboard (all work without errors)
Navigation: Dashboard -> Map -> Assets -> Dashboard (all work without errors)
action_items: Minor: Add separator between stats in map-stats overlay (e.g., '0 localisés | 200 sans GPS')
critical_code_review_comments: Map page correctly implements fullscreen mode by hiding main sidebar via PremiumLayout
Map sidebar is independent from main sidebar - good separation of concerns
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
External API is slow (15s+) but data loads correctly
seed_data_creation: None - using external API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 premium pages (Dashboard, Assets, Map) fully tested and working. Map page is fullscreen with independent sidebar. Key testids: premium-map, map-sidebar, map-search-input, map-filters, map-filter-all/reception/exit, map-asset-list, map-asset-item-*, map-sidebar-toggle, map-container, map-fab-group, map-recenter-btn, map-stats. External API is slow (15-20 seconds for data load). Login credentials: admin/user@1234. Dashboard at /tagdashboard/index, Assets at /view/engin/index, Map at /tour/index.
